title: boronia candollei
intro: Boronia candollei, also known as the pink boronia, is a flowering plant species native to Western Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Boronia candollei include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity against certain bacteria and fungi. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to support skin health and wound healing.
